finding.title: Duplicate id '{group}' in {count} files
finding.explanation: The id '{group}' is declared by multiple archives: {values}. Only one can load.

finding.title: Mixin target overlap: {subject}
finding.fix: Check mod compatibility notes and prefer versions known to share this target.

finding.title: Mixin target overlap: {subject}
finding.fix: Check mod compatibility notes and prefer versions known to share this target.

finding.title: High-risk @Overwrite mixin: {attr:target}
finding.explanation: {subject} overwrites code in {attr:target}. @Overwrite has a high compatibility risk because it replaces target behavior.
finding.fix: Prefer versions without competing overwrites, or remove one conflicting mod.
